name: 1'4"x2'4" Oh Hello Rectangular Outdoor Doormat Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring a welcoming vibe to your entryway with this Oh Hello Rectangular Outdoor Doormat from Room Essentials™. The rectangular doormat is crafted from 100% coir material to remove dirt and debris from shoes, while the latex backing helps keep it securely in place. Perfect for everyday use, it features the black-lettered text "Oh, Hello" on a natural brown background, creating a warm entryway. Plus, the medium-pile construction provides comfortable cushioning underfoot.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
